instruction: Clarify how both authenticated and unauthenticated attackers can exploit these XSS vulnerabilities.
input: An issue was discovered in CALDERA 2.8.1. It contains multiple reflected, stored, and self XSS vulnerabilities that may be exploited by authenticated and unauthenticated attackers.
output: Authenticated attackers can leverage their access credentials to exploit stored XSS vulnerabilities, while unauthenticated attackers may exploit reflected or self XSS to affect users who access crafted URLs or inputs.
